adresse.title: Your address
adresse.description:
Enter your address in {ville} to get the waste collection schedule for your sector.

Tip: Visit your city's widget ({widget_url}) to see the expected address format. Example: 123 rue des Érables

choisir_adresse.title: Confirm your address
choisir_adresse.description: Choose your address from the list.

error.adresse_non_trouvee: No address found. Visit your city's widget to see the expected format. Example: 123 rue des Érables
